libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is required. If keeping Base64 coverage for 2.38.0, update tests for the current API: Base64 exposes encodeObject(Serializable), encodeBytes(byte[][, boolean]), and decode(String[, boolean]); removed members such as DONT_BREAK_LINES and decodeToObject(String) must not be used.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8665 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Upstream artemis-commons has test-scope dependencies such as artemis-unit-test-support and log4j-slf4j2-impl, but they are not needed for generated reachability tests unless copying upstream tests directly.

Some optional coverage areas, such as FactoryFinder, ServiceLoader-based codecs, or XML schema validation, may require test resources created under src/test/resources, but not deterministic driver setup.
NetworkHealthCheck can execute ping/URL checks; avoid making tests depend on external network or Docker because core commons coverage is available without it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable. artemis-commons is a utility/common-runtime artifact with transitive compile dependencies already supplied by the artifact, and its useful APIs can be exercised with in-process unit tests.
